titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University. Vice President for Land Grant Affairs records4-11-1807
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-01-15 18:23:55 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University. Vice President for Land Grant Affairs records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Vice President for Land Grant Affairs

did.abstract: Files of Constance E. Cook as Cornell's Vice President for Land Grant Affairs include records of special events; budgets, salaries, audits, and other financial records; personnel; buildings; State University of New York; statutory colleges at Cornell; and reports, correspondence, and related records.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Files of Constance E. Cook as Cornell's Vice President for Land Grant Affairs include records of special events; budgets, salaries, audits, and other financial records; personnel; buildings; State University of New York; statutory colleges at Cornell; and reports, correspondence, and related records.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Records of the Vice President for Land Grant Affairs, #4-11-1807. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: OLGA - Office of Land Grant Affairs

Analysis of Cornell University Records versus State Appropriations

Health Education, Proposal for Consumer Health Education
Higher Education in New York State
Legislators' Review Session with Cornell Administrators

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: See also: 1978 Legislation, Cornell University Bill - Water Resources Institute.
